name: Tana River Early Warning & Evacuation System
blocking_factor: Inter-agency coordination failure between KMD and county government
notes: Gauge stations installed on upper Tana. SMS alerts not reaching riparian communities. Evacuation routes on flooded roads.

name: Tana River Riparian Settlement Relocation
blocking_factor: Land tenure disputes and political resistance from riparian landlords
notes: Relocation sites identified. Community resistance to permanent move. Political cost of enforcement pre-election.

name: Garissa County Flood Contingency Plan
notes: Plan exists and is partially exercised. Pre-positioned relief stocks underfunded. Coordination with UNHCR (Dadaab) not formalised.

name: Tana Basin Flood Retention Dams
blocking_factor: Environmental impact assessment disputes and funding shortfall
notes: Five dam sites identified since 2012. Two EIAs complete. No construction commenced. Budget absorption limited by contractor qualification barriers.

name: Flood-Resilient Shelter Programme
notes: Design complete for elevated flood-resilient housing. NHC mandate does not cover rural flood zones. Inter-ministry dispute unresolved.

name: Riparian Agriculture Buffer Zones
blocking_factor: Enforcement requires crop destruction — politically unacceptable pre-harvest
notes: Buffer zone boundaries mapped. Cultivation within 30m of Tana River bank is routine. No enforcement action taken since 2019.

name: Dadaab Drainage & Flood Mitigation
notes: Dadaab camp drainage improved 2017-2020. Surrounding host community drainage unaddressed. Refugee-host asymmetry in flood protection is documented.

name: Garissa-Wajir Road Flood-Proof Upgrade
notes: B9 highway elevated and culvert capacity increased 2021. Emergency access to Bura and Ijara improved. Road still impassable during peak Tana floods.
